title: Validate new Branding and Matching version with 100 recent feedback samples
description:
Run a feedback evaluation for CMG - EDU Branding and Matching using the newly created single-request ScoreVersion.

Scope:
- Evaluate scorecard 1039, score 45425, version c918b11b-8fca-4dbd-b7b4-d130e5f98e94
- Use recent feedback items with max_samples=100
- Capture evaluation ID and metrics (AC1, accuracy, precision, recall, confusion matrix)
- Record results in Kanbus

Assumption:
- "Recent feedback items" interpreted as last 30 days.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Work started.

Running feedback evaluation for scorecard 1039 / score 45425 / version c918b11b-8fca-4dbd-b7b4-d130e5f98e94 with days=30 and max-samples=100. Will return evaluation ID and metrics.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Run attempt 1 failed before scoring items.

Command:
python -m plexus.cli evaluate feedback --scorecard 1039 --score 45425 --days 30 --version c918b11b-8fca-4dbd-b7b4-d130e5f98e94 --max-items 100

Failure:
- Evaluation record created: df5c6275-c03f-451e-a209-8965e3c1e558
- litellm UnsupportedParamsError: gpt-5 models do not support temperature=0.1; only temperature=1.

Next:
- Update score YAML Agent temperature to 1 for gpt-5.4-nano.
- Push new ScoreVersion.
- Rerun same 30d/100-item feedback accuracy evaluation and capture metrics.
